note: Deleted the 6 redirect-shadowed duplicate articles consolidated in #443/#450/#451 (user-approved). Each URL is 301'd at the edge to its canonical via redirects-manual.json (deployed), so deletion causes NO 404 window. Pre-delete safety check confirmed every target resolves to a canonical and none is itself a canonical. The redirect-manual entries are LEFT IN PLACE so the URLs keep 301-ing after deletion.
rootCauseStillLive: The generator (author 'LA Mattress Store') will likely recreate these; the redirect-shadows persist and will catch recreations at the same handles. Permanent fix requires disabling the generator + rotating SHOPIFY_ADMIN_TOKEN (owner actions).
